languages.text: "У меня лишь одно желание — сохранить и приумножить величие династии. Мы — Вольные Торговцы, ими нам и должно оставаться. Немногие независимо мыслящие, свободные от догматов Адептус Терра, любопытные, способные возразить всем, кроме Бога-Императора. Крестоносцы Его-на-Терре. Только так. Я не могу дозволить вам превратить династию в тень того, чем она должна быть! Просто не могу". {n}К концу жаркой речи вам кажется, что вы почти что слышите настоящие, а не модулированные эмоции в голосе Себериана. Почти слышите голос, которым он обладал до получения страшных ран.{/n}

"I only have one wish, and that is to preserve and bolster the greatness of our dynasty. We are Rogue Traders, and that is what we must remain. A rare few independent thinkers, unconstrained by Adeptus Terra dogma, inquisitive, and bold enough to oppose anyone save the God-Emperor. We are the crusaders of Him on Terra. That and nothing else. I cannot allow you to reduce the dynasty to a shadow of what it is meant to be! I simply cannot." {n}Toward the end of his impassioned speech, the modulated emotions in Seberian's voice sound almost real to you. You can almost hear the voice he spoke with before his terrible injuries.{/n}
languages.original_text: "У меня лишь одно желание — сохранить и приумножить величие династии. Мы — Вольные Торговцы, ими нам и должно оставаться. Я не могу дозволить вам превратить династию в тень того, чем она должна быть! Просто не могу". {n}К концу жаркой речи вам кажется, что вы почти что слышите настоящие, а не модулированные эмоции в голосе Себериана. Почти слышите голос, которым он обладал до получения страшных ран.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I only have one wish, and that is to preserve and increase the greatness of our dynasty. We are Rogue Traders, and that is who we must remain. Part of a handful of independent thinkers, unconstrained by Adeptus Terra dogma, inquisitive, and bold enough to oppose anyone save the God-Emperor. The crusaders of Him on Terra. That and nothing else. I cannot allow you to reduce the dynasty to a shadow of what it is meant to be! I simply cannot." {n}Toward the end of his impassioned speech, the modulated emotions in Seberian's voice almost sound real to you. You can almost hear the voice he spoke with before his terrible injuries.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich habe nur einen Wunsch ... die Größe unserer Dynastie zu erhalten und zu stärken. Wir sind Freihändler und müssen es bleiben. Unabhängige Denker, frei vom Dogma des Adeptus Terra, wissbegierig und mutig genug, sich jedem außer dem Gottimperator zu widersetzen. Wir sind Seine Kreuzritter auf Terra. Das und nichts anderes. Ich kann nicht zulassen, dass Ihr die Dynastie zu einem Schatten ihrer selbst verkommen lasst! Das kann ich einfach nicht." {n}Am Ende seiner leidenschaftlichen Ansprache kommen dir die modulierten Gefühle in Seberians Stimme beinahe real vor. Du kannst fast die Stimme hören, mit der er vor seinen schrecklichen Verletzungen sprach.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I only have one wish, and that is to preserve and bolster the greatness of our dynasty. We are Rogue Traders, and that is what we must remain. A rare few independent thinkers, unconstrained by Adeptus Terra dogma, inquisitive, and bold enough to oppose anyone save the God-Emperor. We are the crusaders of Him on Terra. That and nothing else. I cannot allow you to reduce the dynasty to a shadow of what it is meant to be! I simply cannot." {n}Toward the end of his impassioned speech, the modulated emotions in Seberian's voice sound almost real to you. You can almost hear the voice he spoke with before his terrible injuries.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe nur einen Wunsch ... die Größe unserer Dynastie zu erhalten und zu stärken. Wir sind Freihändler und müssen es bleiben. Unabhängige Denker, frei vom Dogma des Adeptus Terra, wissbegierig und mutig genug, sich jedem außer dem Gottimperator zu widersetzen. Wir sind Seine Kreuzritter auf Terra. Das und nichts anderes. Ich kann nicht zulassen, dass Ihr die Dynastie zu einem Schatten ihrer selbst verkommen lasst! Das kann ich einfach nicht." {n}Am Ende seiner leidenschaftlichen Ansprache kommen dir die modulierten Gefühle in Seberians Stimme beinahe real vor. Du kannst fast die Stimme hören, mit der er vor seinen schrecklichen Verletzungen sprach.{/n}

languages.text: « Je n'ai qu'un unique souhait : préserver et renforcer la grandeur de notre dynastie. Nous sommes des libres-marchands, et nous le resterons. Des libres-penseurs détachés du dogme de l'Adeptus Terra, curieux et suffisamment courageux pour s'opposer à tous, sauf à l'Empereur-Dieu. Nous sommes Ses croisés sur Terra. Ni plus ni moins. Je ne vous laisserai pas réduire notre dynastie à l'ombre de ce qu'elle devrait être ! C'est hors de question. » {n}Alors que son discours enflammé touche à sa fin, les émotions modulées dans la voix de Seberian vous paraissent presque vraies. Vous avez l'impression d'entendre sa voix telle qu'elle était avant ses terribles blessures.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I only have one wish, and that is to preserve and bolster the greatness of our dynasty. We are Rogue Traders, and that is what we must remain. A rare few independent thinkers, unconstrained by Adeptus Terra dogma, inquisitive, and bold enough to oppose anyone save the God-Emperor. We are the crusaders of Him on Terra. That and nothing else. I cannot allow you to reduce the dynasty to a shadow of what it is meant to be! I simply cannot." {n}Toward the end of his impassioned speech, the modulated emotions in Seberian's voice sound almost real to you. You can almost hear the voice he spoke with before his terrible injuries.{/n}

Des libres-penseurs détachés du dogme de l'Adeptus Terra, curieux et suffisamment courageux pour s'opposer à tous, sauf à l'Empereur-Dieu. Nous sommes Ses croisés sur Terra. Ni plus ni moins. Je ne vous laisserai pas réduire notre dynastie à l'ombre de ce qu'elle devrait être ! C'est hors de question. » {n}Alors que son discours enflammé touche à sa fin, les émotions modulées dans la voix de Seberian vous paraissent presque vraies. Vous avez l'impression d'entendre sa voix telle qu'elle était avant ses terribles blessures.{/n}

languages.text: «Solo tengo un deseo: preservar y reforzar la grandeza de nuestra dinastía. Somos Comerciantes Independientes y eso es lo que debemos seguir siendo. Los escasísimos pensadores independientes, libres del dogma del Adeptus Terra, curiosos y lo bastante osados para oponernos a todos menos al propio Dios Emperador. Somos Sus cruzados en Terra. Eso y nada más. ¡No puedo permitir que reduzca la dinastía a una sombra de lo que ha de ser! No puedo». {n}Hacia el final de su apasionado discurso, las emociones moduladas de la voz de Seberian parecen reales. Casi puedes oír la voz con la que hablaba antes de sus espantosas heridas.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I only have one wish, and that is to preserve and bolster the greatness of our dynasty. We are Rogue Traders, and that is what we must remain. A rare few independent thinkers, unconstrained by Adeptus Terra dogma, inquisitive, and bold enough to oppose anyone save the God-Emperor. We are the crusaders of Him on Terra. That and nothing else. I cannot allow you to reduce the dynasty to a shadow of what it is meant to be! I simply cannot." {n}Toward the end of his impassioned speech, the modulated emotions in Seberian's voice sound almost real to you. You can almost hear the voice he spoke with before his terrible injuries.{/n}

Eso y nada más. ¡No puedo permitir que reduzca la dinastía a una sombra de lo que ha de ser! No puedo». {n}Hacia el final de su apasionado discurso, las emociones moduladas de la voz de Seberian parecen reales. Casi puedes oír la voz con la que hablaba antes de sus espantosas heridas.{/n}

languages.text: "Tek bir dileğim var, o da hanedanlığımızın büyüklüğünü korumak ve güçlendirmek. Biz Hür Taciriz ve böyle kalmalıyız. Adeptus Terra dogmalarıyla kısıtlanmamış, meraklı ve Tanrı İmparator dışında herkese karşı çıkacak kadar cesur birkaç bağımsız düşünür. Biz O'nun Terra'daki mücahitleriyiz. Bu kadar. Hanedanlığı, olması gerekenin gölgesine indirgemene izin veremem! Kesinlikle yapamam." {n}Ateşli konuşmasının sonuna doğru Seberian'ın sesindeki modüle edilmiş duygular sana neredeyse gerçek gibi geliyor. O korkunç yaralanmalarından önceki sesi neredeyse duyabiliyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: “我只有一个愿望，那就是保住我们王朝的伟业，将它发扬光大。我们永远承担着行商浪人的身份。我们是寥寥无几的独立思想者，不受泰拉政府的教条束缚。我们敢于探索，也敢于对抗任何人——除了神皇。我们是祂在泰拉的远征者。仅此而已，别无他职。我不会允许你把王朝变成一个徒有其表的空壳！我绝不允许。”{n}在这段慷慨陈词的末尾，塞贝里安声音里被调制出来的情绪几乎跟真的一样。你似乎都能听出来他遭受重创之前的嗓音。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I only have one wish, and that is to preserve and bolster the greatness of our dynasty. We are Rogue Traders, and that is what we must remain. A rare few independent thinkers, unconstrained by Adeptus Terra dogma, inquisitive, and bold enough to oppose anyone save the God-Emperor. We are the crusaders of Him on Terra. That and nothing else. I cannot allow you to reduce the dynasty to a shadow of what it is meant to be! I simply cannot." {n}Toward the end of his impassioned speech, the modulated emotions in Seberian's voice sound almost real to you. You can almost hear the voice he spoke with before his terrible injuries.{/n}

languages.text: 「私の願いは一つだけ、そしてそれは、我々の王朝の大いなる栄光を維持し、強化することです。我々はローグ・トレーダーであり、そうあり続けるべきです。稀な独立した思考を持つ者たち、アデプタ・テラ教義に縛られない者たち、好奇心旺盛で、神皇帝以外には誰にも抵抗する勇気を持つ者たちです。我々はテラにおける神の使徒です。それ以外に何もありません。私は、あなたに王朝を本来の姿の影に貶めさせてはなりません！絶対に許せません！」{n}情熱的な演説の終わり頃、シベリアンの声の感情が変化する様子が、まるで本物のように聞こえます。彼の恐ろしい怪我を負う前の声、聞こえてくるようです。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I only have one wish, and that is to preserve and bolster the greatness of our dynasty. We are Rogue Traders, and that is what we must remain. A rare few independent thinkers, unconstrained by Adeptus Terra dogma, inquisitive, and bold enough to oppose anyone save the God-Emperor. We are the crusaders of Him on Terra. That and nothing else. I cannot allow you to reduce the dynasty to a shadow of what it is meant to be! I simply cannot." {n}Toward the end of his impassioned speech, the modulated emotions in Seberian's voice sound almost real to you. You can almost hear the voice he spoke with before his terrible injuries.{/n}
